originalFamilyScopeSummary: Rename branch-maintenance flow to update-branch and prefer rebase
currentTriggerSummary: pr-complete: address the 4 confirmed second-round (cross-model) review findings on PR #320
notes: All 4 confirmed findings from the round-2 review at HEAD 24eda26e were fixed: (1) recovery chain path in run.ts no longer swallows loadProjectVars errors and now validates the chained ref before createRun; (2) store.ts load migration normalizes persisted taskTemplate.fileName merge-main.md -> update-branch.md, covered by a new test; (3) backfill-orphan-runs.mjs runs flowType through a normalizeFlowType mirror before FLOW_STEPS lookup; (4) BRANCH_UPDATE_STRATEGY added to the template-variable catalog and generated references regenerated. The two explicitly-waived items were left unchanged by design. Validation: typecheck pass, full gateway node:test suite 174 files 0 failures (incl. new migration test), lint ratchet 0 new, format clean, changelog guard passed. No UI surface touched, so CDP validation is N/A.
